issue_title: Saved dashboard filters not applied on first page load

structured_output.root_cause_analysis: Default filter state was set after the initial chart fetch, so the first render ignored it.
structured_output.resolution_summary: Initialize the filter state before the first chart data request.

file_changes.change_summary: Seed default filters before initial fetch.

code_diff:
--- a/superset-frontend/src/dashboard/reducers/dashboardState.ts
+++ b/...
@@
-  // fetch then apply
+  // apply default filters, then fetch

worklog.message: Investigate and fix issue #9002: Saved dashboard filters not applied on first page load
Reproduced the issue, identified the root cause and opened a PR. Initialize the filter state before the first chart data request.
